element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns movement and evasion mechanics
Core tension source; player learns avoidance and consequence system
Used for bail payment and shop transactions; incentivizes exploration
Primary currency farming location; optional extended stay
Item trading and purchasing with nickels
Gating mechanism; collecting candy unlocks malt shop access
Date arrangement triggers apartment sequence; story progression
Vertical platforming challenge; failure resets to ground level
Gating based on candy collection; rewards exploration

typical_relief_triggers: Entering safe zones (shops, Slash Club, malt shop)
Completing currency farming in Las Vegas
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating between exploration/collection phases (low tension) and avoidance/consequence sequences (moderate tension), with climactic apartment ascent providing high tension finale

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Candy collection gates access to malt shop; nickels enable optional Las Vegas visits for currency farming

difficulty_curve.early_game: Low; player learns avoidance basics and currency collection with minimal Popper Police encounters
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Moderate; increased police patrols, multi-location navigation, gating mechanics with candy/currency requirements
difficulty_curve.late_game: Moderate-High; Holli's apartment exterior vertical platforming with reset-on-failure mechanic creates skill check
notable_spikes: First Popper Police encounter introduces arrest consequences
Holli's apartment climbing sequence requires sustained platforming precision with failure penalty

notable_level_patterns.description: Central game world connects to discrete locations (Las Vegas, pawn shop, Slash Club, malt shop, apartment); players navigate between hubs while managing police encounters and resource collection
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Main Cool World area serving as navigation hub

notable_level_patterns.description: Malt shop access restricted by candy threshold; apartment access requires date arrangement; creates soft gating tied to optional exploration and objective completion
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Malt shop entry requirement; Slash Club dating system

notable_level_patterns.description: Holli's apartment exterior presents vertical platforming challenge separate from horizontal exploration; failure resets to ground, raising stakes
